name: Agent Skills for Context Engineering
description: Production context engineering skills for Google Antigravity IDE. 15 skills covering context fundamentals, degradation, compression, multi-agent patterns, memory systems, tool design, filesystem context, hosted agents, optimization, latent briefing, evaluation, advanced evaluation, harness engineering, project development, and BDI mental states.
author: maybeanns

plugins.name: Context Engineering Skills
plugins.description: Complete collection of 15 context engineering skills

skills.name: context-fundamentals
skills.description: Understand what context is, why it matters, and the anatomy of context in agent systems

skills.name: context-degradation
skills.description: Recognize patterns of context failure: lost-in-middle, poisoning, distraction, and clash

skills.name: context-compression
skills.description: Design and evaluate compression strategies for long-running sessions

skills.name: multi-agent-patterns
skills.description: Master orchestrator, peer-to-peer, and hierarchical multi-agent architectures

skills.name: memory-systems
skills.description: Design short-term, long-term, and graph-based memory architectures

skills.name: tool-design
skills.description: Build tools that agents can use effectively

skills.name: filesystem-context
skills.description: Use filesystems for dynamic context discovery, tool output offloading, and plan persistence

skills.name: hosted-agents
skills.description: Build background coding agents with sandboxed VMs, pre-built images, and multiplayer support

skills.name: context-optimization
skills.description: Apply compaction, masking, and caching strategies

skills.name: latent-briefing
skills.description: Share task-relevant orchestrator state with workers via task-guided KV cache compaction

skills.name: evaluation
skills.description: Build evaluation frameworks for agent systems

skills.name: advanced-evaluation
skills.description: Master LLM-as-a-Judge techniques: direct scoring, pairwise comparison, rubric generation, and bias mitigation

skills.name: harness-engineering
skills.description: Design autonomous agent harnesses with locked metrics, durable logs, novelty gates, rollback, and human approval boundaries

skills.name: project-development
skills.description: Design and build LLM projects from ideation through deployment

skills.name: bdi-mental-states
skills.description: Transform external RDF context into agent mental states using formal BDI ontology patterns
